Send a correction
Post Comment
Ive had mine since level 4
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2003 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758741976
View User Forum
30 posts
Jeez you guys make it sound like this is impossible to get. I have had my purple sash since level 4. if you dont believe I have it look me up I'm on Namless server name is Tizun. Guildmasters are wimps I dropped him no sweat. LOL yeah right someone was killing GM and said hey loot this guy when I passed them to go train I got really lucky. I need to get the headbands done. I dont wear it anymore instead have a spider fur belt that I wear better ac weighs 0.0 and good stats also. Keep an eye out when ever your in Qeynos for someone killing the monks and ask if you can loot the sash.
▲ Page top
Smurfs
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2002 at 2:39 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361611323
View User Forum
24 posts
After a few years of the monk guildmasters telling me they didnt have any more purple sashes I just couldnt take it anymore... I knew they were holding out. Anyway, often times there is too much emphasis on faction hits. This faction can always be adjusted with minimal effort. I know from much experience. I have gone from kos to ally to kos to ally again in both Qeynos and Freeport. A few kills here... a few simple quests there... help a few newbies and your good to go. As far as the stats on the item, not all that bad, yes there is better... but this isnt that hard of an item to obtain. Plus it goes great with my Purple Headband. ;)
▲ Page top
this sash sucks
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2002 at 10:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255174024
11 posts
this SUCKS
kill a guild master everyone is suddenly pissed off at you and you get +1 to stats

Edited, Sun Jul 21 11:23:27 2002
▲ Page top
Sometimes I wonder...
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750151970
81 posts
... if the person putting stats on the headbands and sashes thought stats work the same as in D&D...

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 04 2001 at 5:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) personally i think the sash's suck there is no point to them use your time and geta TBB or Spider fur girdle ermm whatever.
idiot
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2002 at 6:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758910072
59 posts
Oh, yes, the sashes suck. No point in getting them at all. Unless you are not a twink. And what's that about these being required for the monk epic? Epic? What's that? And why would *anyone* want it? Well, jeez, if I have to spend a coupla hours getting these sashes, the epic is just *out* Forget that. I'll make a new twink, who doesn't have to do anyof this 'questing' crap.

I'm 47 now. I also have an Iksar monk alternate. Un-twinked.
▲ Page top
not so good.

Is it my imagination or are the Higher level Shackles for iksar monks, LOADS better than similarly leveled Headbands and sashes?

There must be something wrong with that pic. It's a fake or something. I mean you kill a master and you get +1 stats? Who the hell made this game. SATAN? rofl
